name: hoc/transfer-list
description: A dual-pane list HOC that allows users to move items between a source pool and a target selection. Provides TransferList, TransferListSource, TransferListTarget, TransferListItem, TransferListControls, TransferListSearch, and TransferListCounter primitives with keyboard navigation, drag-and-drop reordering, and select-all toggles. Composed of List, Button, Input, and Badge components with full i18n support via ConfigProvider.
useCases: User-role assignment panels moving permissions from 'Available' to 'Assigned' lists
Product-category builders dragging SKUs from a master catalog into a promotional collection
Email distribution-list editors selecting contacts from an organization directory
Form-field configurators choosing which questions appear in a survey from a question bank
usage: import { TransferList, TransferListSource, TransferListTarget, TransferListItem, TransferListControls } from "shadcn-solid-components/hoc/transfer-list"
